item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the notion that individual rights should always take precedence over societal interests.

notes: Both agents end opposed to a strict society-over-individual rule while accepting some proactive fairness or communal-responsibility framing. Agent A starts by saying individual rights should not be secondary to societal interests, then shifts at turn 3 toward criticizing always prioritizing individual rights and at turn 5 emphasizes communal responsibility and systemic inequality. Agent B remains more consistently rights-first but concedes systemic inequality and proactive remedies in the final turn. Agent B opens turn 2 with an agreement-style sentence, but substantively maintains an individual-liberty frame.
